strengths: Extensive multi-language expertise across web, mobile, and embedded systems with a focus on testability and user experience
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows
Entrepreneurial background with open-source contributions and leadership in building scalable platforms
concerns: Limited explicit mention of AI-related academic credentials (Master's/PhD) despite strong practical experience
Recent roles show heavy focus on general software development rather than specialized AI/cloud strategy
No clear evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on cutting-edge AI technologies
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility with 15+ years in software engineering and leadership roles, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work, but lacks clear evidence of strategic AI/cloud consulting or directorship-level experience. His entrepreneurial background and open-source contributions are assets, yet his resume does not emphasize AI specialization or customer-facing strategy work as prominently as required.
